name: 12.25"x5.25" Small Textured Ceramic Lamp Base Black - Threshold™: Chic Raised Design, ETL Listed
description: Illuminate your home in style with this Small Black Textured Ceramic Lamp Base from Threshold™. This table lamp base makes a great complement to your indoor lighting. Made from ceramic, it features a chic raised design for a textured look, and a solid black color that coordinates with any decor. This stylish lamp base comes with a simple on/off switch for effortless illumination. Plus, it's compatible with small lampshades. Place it on a side table in your living room, lounge room or on the console table for endless display potential around your home.
